title: MGW Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for mgw-plugin.json plugin manifests. Defines how third-party plugins extend MGW at runtime without patching core.

type.description: Plugin extension point. agent-template: provides a custom agent type; hook: runs at pipeline lifecycle events; validator: validates issues, plans, or PRs

entrypoint.description: Relative path to the plugin's main module file (e.g. 'index.cjs'). Must be within the plugin directory.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this plugin does

homepage.description: URL to the plugin's homepage or repository

supported_stages.description: Pipeline stages this plugin applies to. Omit or use empty array for all stages.

hooks.description: Hook definitions for type=hook plugins. Each entry names a lifecycle event and the handler function to call.

config_schema.description: JSON Schema fragment for plugin-specific user configuration. If present, the loader validates the user's plugin config block against this schema.

requires_mgw_version.description: Minimum MGW version required by this plugin (semver range, e.g. '>=0.4.0')

name.description: Pipeline lifecycle event to hook into

handler.description: Name of the exported function in the entrypoint module to call for this hook
